feed.title: Haryoaw Deep Blog
feed.subtitle: Haryoaw Deep Blog that contains random tech (in AI, NLP, ML), personal development, and random stuffs. Anyone that is interested in those area should visit my blog. Author : Haryo Akbarianto Wibowo

entry.title: Examples of Information Retrieval Application on Image and Text

link.title: Examples of Information Retrieval Application on Image and Text

entry.summary: Hello, welcome to my second blog post. In this post, I want to write what I shared when I got invited as a guest lecturer at the University of Indonesia for Advanced Information Retrieval course. I shared several Information Retrieval implementation ideas that can be used in the real world. I will write about high-level technical details here. So, I think this post is newbie-friendly, as long ...

entry.title: Create Indonesian Recipe Generator by Fine-tuning T5, BART, and GPT-2

link.title: Create Indonesian Recipe Generator by Fine-tuning T5, BART, and GPT-2

entry.summary: An Indonesian recipe generator Deep Learning model trained by fine-tuning pre-trained models such as T5, BART, and GPT-2 Hello Everyone! Welcome to my first technical post on my personal blog! In this post, I will write about one of my fun projects, Indonesia Recipe Generator. This is the continuation of my previous medium post with more modern approach. This post will tell you about the de...

entry.title: My Warm Welcome!
entry.summary: Warm Welcome from me! Random Anya Welcome, everyone! Finally, my personal blog has been created 😊😊😊😊! I’m happy that my plan of having a personal blog is realized! Phew… It’s been a long time since I haven’t written any new posts. Well, let me open up that I actually want to write something on the past. But, yeah a lot of stuff happened, and it had been neglected. When I came back to write ...
